name: Naomi - Angels With Scaly Wings - A Solitary Mind
description:
The reclusive police escort Dragon from the brilliant A Solitary Mind mod for the Angels With Scaly Wings visual novel. Following the arrival of the Human ambassador (you) in the Dragon world, you're assigned a rotating police escort, one of which happens to be this big, lovable, and nerdy water dragon, Naomi.

This is the version of Naomi from the mod, and retains her appearance and backstory. Naomi is only mentioned in AWSW and truth be told, I like the design from the mod a lot better than Naomi from the Angels With Broken Hearts comic.
creator: CatholicMoonCat
